uses.en: Commonly used in soups, teas, and tonic formulas. Can be sliced and steeped in hot water.
uses.zh: 常用于炖汤、泡茶、入药方。可切片冲泡热水饮用。
uses.ja: スープ、お茶、薬膳に使用。薄切りにして熱湯で浸します。
uses.fr: Utilisé couramment dans les soupes, thés et toniques. Peut être tranché et infusé dans l'eau chaude.

precautions.en: Not recommended for pregnant women or people with high blood pressure. Consult a healthcare provider before use.
precautions.zh: 孕妇及高血压患者慎用。使用前请咨询医生。
precautions.ja: 妊娠中または高血圧の方は使用を避けてください。
precautions.fr: Non recommandé pour les femmes enceintes ou les personnes souffrant d'hypertension.

modern_research: Multiple studies show ginseng may improve cognitive performance, boost immune function, and reduce fatigue. (PubMed: 23717137, 21154383, 29624410)

uses.en: Often used in soups, teas, and herbal formulas. Can be added to chicken soup for immune support.
uses.zh: 常用于煲汤、泡茶、入药方。可加入鸡汤中增强免疫力。
uses.ja: スープやお茶、漢方方剤に使用。鶏スープに加えて免疫を強化します。
uses.fr: Utilisé dans les soupes, thés et formules herbalistes. Peut être ajouté au poulet pour soutenir l'immunité.

precautions.en: Not suitable for people with autoimmune diseases or those taking immunosuppressants.
precautions.zh: 自身免疫性疾病患者及服用免疫抑制剂者不宜使用。
precautions.ja: 自己免疫疾患の方や免疫抑制剤を使用の方は避けてください。
precautions.fr: Non adapté aux personnes atteintes de maladies auto-immunes ou prenant des immunosuppresseurs.

modern_research: Research shows astragalus may boost immune function and protect cardiovascular health. (PubMed: 28830214, 32382301)

uses.en: Eat raw as a snack, add to teas, or use in cooking. Popular in trail mixes and health foods.
uses.zh: 可直接食用、泡茶、煲汤。常用于养生零食和健康食品。
uses.ja: スナックとして生で食べたり、お茶や料理に使います。
uses.fr: Consommé cru comme snack, ajouté aux thés ou en cuisine. Populaire dans les mélanges trail et aliments santé.

precautions.en: May interact with blood thinners and diabetes medications. Use in moderation.
precautions.zh: 可能与抗凝血药物和糖尿病药物相互作用。适量食用。
precautions.ja: 血液凝固薬や糖尿病薬と相互作用する可能性があります。
precautions.fr: Peut interagir avec les anticoagulants et les médicaments contre le diabète.

modern_research: Studies show goji berries improve vision, boost immunity, and are rich in antioxidants. (PubMed: 35898713, 21169874, 30728882)

uses.en: Available as tea, extract, powder, or capsules. Can be sliced and steeped in hot water.
uses.zh: 可制成茶、提取物、粉剂或胶囊。可切片冲泡热水。
uses.ja: お茶、エキス、パウダー、カプセルとして利用可能。
uses.fr: Disponible en thé, extrait, poudre ou gélules. Peut être tranché et infusé.

precautions.en: May interact with blood pressure and blood thinning medications.
precautions.zh: 可能与降压药和抗凝血药物相互作用。
precautions.ja: 血圧薬や血液凝固薬と相互作用する可能性があります。
precautions.fr: Peut interagir avec les médicaments contre l'hypertension et les anticoagulants.

modern_research: Research indicates reishi may support immune function, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality. (PubMed: 29782718)

uses.en: Used in cooking (curry), teas, and supplements. Combine with black pepper for better absorption.
uses.zh: 用于烹饪（咖喱）、泡茶、补充剂。与黑胡椒同用可增强吸收。
uses.ja: 料理（カレー）、お茶、サプリメントに使用。ペッパーと一緒に吸収を向上。
uses.fr: Utilisé en cuisine (curcuma), thés et compléments. Combiner avec du poivre noir pour une meilleure absorption.

precautions.en: May interact with blood thinners. Consult doctor before high-dose supplementation.
precautions.zh: 可能与抗凝血药物相互作用。高剂量补充前请咨询医生。
precautions.ja: 血液凝固薬と相互作用する可能性があります。
precautions.fr: Peut interagir avec les anticoagulants. Consultez un médecin avant la supplémentation à haute dose.

modern_research: Extensive research shows curcumin (active compound) has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. (PubMed: 29065496)

uses.en: Tea, tincture, capsules, or topical cream. Steep dried root in hot water for 10 minutes.
uses.zh: 可制成茶、酊剂、胶囊或外用膏。将干燥根部浸泡在热水中10分钟。

precautions.en: Not recommended for autoimmune conditions. May cause allergic reactions in people allergic to ragweed.
precautions.zh: 自身免疫性疾病患者不宜使用。对豚草过敏者可能引起过敏反应。

modern_research: Studies show echinacea may reduce the duration of colds by 1-4 days. (PubMed: 15080016, 22214745)

uses.en: Tea, essential oil, or topical application. Steep flowers in hot water for 5-10 minutes.
uses.zh: 可制成茶、精油或外用。将花朵浸泡在热水中5-10分钟。

precautions.en: May cause allergic reactions in people allergic to ragweed family plants.
precautions.zh: 对菊科植物过敏者可能引起过敏反应。

modern_research: Clinical trials support chamomile for mild anxiety and sleep improvement. (PubMed: 21158693, 20373604)

uses.en: Tea, essential oil, topical cream, or fresh leaves. Steep leaves in hot water for 5-7 minutes.
uses.zh: 可制成茶、精油、外用膏或使用新鲜叶子。将叶子浸泡在热水中5-7分钟。

precautions.en: Not recommended for infants and young children. May worsen acid reflux.
precautions.zh: 婴幼儿不宜使用。可能加重胃酸反流。

modern_research: Peppermint oil is effective for irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) symptoms. (PubMed: 22031628, 19660844)

uses.en: Essential oil for aromatherapy, topical application, or tea. Add flowers to bath water.
uses.zh: 精油用于芳香疗法、外用或泡茶。将花朵加入浴水中。

precautions.en: May cause skin irritation in some people. Do not ingest large quantities of essential oil.
precautions.zh: 可能引起皮肤刺激。不可大量摄入精油。

modern_research: Lavender aromatherapy shown to reduce anxiety in clinical settings. (PubMed: 22517575, 21592046)

uses.en: Raw in cooking, aged garlic extract, or supplements. Crush and let sit 10 minutes before cooking to activate allicin.
uses.zh: 烹饪中生用、陈蒜提取物或补充剂。切碎后静置10分钟再烹饪以激活大蒜素。

precautions.en: May interact with blood thinners. Avoid before surgery.
precautions.zh: 可能与抗凝血药物相互作用。手术前避免使用。

modern_research: Extensive research supports garlic for cardiovascular health and immune function. (PubMed: 20592568, 15664780)

uses.en: Fresh in cooking, tea, or supplements. Slice and steep in hot water for ginger tea.
uses.zh: 烹饪中新鲜使用、泡茶或补充剂。切片浸泡在热水中制成姜茶。

precautions.en: May interact with blood thinners and diabetes medications.
precautions.zh: 可能与抗凝血药物和糖尿病药物相互作用。

modern_research: Ginger is well-studied for anti-nausea effects and anti-inflammatory properties. (PubMed: 23680872, 26509486)

uses.en: Spice in cooking, tea, or supplements. Add to warm drinks and desserts.
uses.zh: 烹饪调料、泡茶或补充剂。加入热饮和甜点中。

precautions.en: Cassia cinnamon contains coumarin; use Ceylon cinnamon for medicinal purposes. May interact with diabetes medications.
precautions.zh: 中国肉桂含香豆素，药用建议使用锡兰肉桂。可能与糖尿病药物相互作用。

modern_research: Studies show cinnamon may help lower blood sugar and improve insulin sensitivity. (PubMed: 21776527, 20433692)

uses.en: Cooking herb, tea, essential oil, or hair rinse. Steep fresh or dried leaves in hot water.
uses.zh: 烹饪香料、泡茶、精油或洗发水。将新鲜或干燥叶子浸泡在热水中。

precautions.en: Avoid during pregnancy in medicinal doses. May interact with blood pressure medications.
precautions.zh: 孕期避免药用剂量。可能与降压药相互作用。

modern_research: Rosemary contains carnosic acid which may protect brain health and improve memory. (PubMed: 22185483, 27004614)

uses.en: Cooking herb, tea, essential oil, or throat gargle. Steep leaves in hot water for respiratory support.
uses.zh: 烹饪香料、泡茶、精油或漱口液。将叶子浸泡在热水中用于呼吸系统。

precautions.en: Thyme oil is very concentrated; dilute before topical use.
precautions.zh: 百里香精油浓度很高，外用前需稀释。

modern_research: Thymol (active compound) has proven antimicrobial and expectorant properties. (PubMed: 22136025)

uses.en: Tea, tincture, or capsules. Steep root in hot water for 10-15 minutes before bed.
uses.zh: 可制成茶、酊剂或胶囊。睡前将根部浸泡在热水中10-15分钟。

precautions.en: Do not combine with alcohol or sedatives. May cause morning grogginess.
precautions.zh: 不可与酒精或镇静剂合用。可能导致早晨昏沉。

modern_research: Valerian shows modest benefits for sleep quality in clinical trials. (PubMed: 20384793, 18072823)

uses.en: Capsules, tincture, or tea. Standardized extract (silymarin) is most common.
uses.zh: 胶囊、酊剂或茶。标准化提取物（水飞蓟素）最常用。

precautions.en: May interact with medications metabolized by the liver.
precautions.zh: 可能与肝脏代谢的药物相互作用。

modern_research: Silymarin is well-studied for liver protection and may help with liver disease. (PubMed: 21296071, 16522831)

en: Rich in vitamins A, C, K

uses.en: Root tea, leaf salad, or supplements. Roasted root makes a coffee substitute.
uses.zh: 根泡茶、叶做沙拉或补充剂。烤根可代替咖啡。

precautions.en: May cause allergic reactions in people allergic to ragweed. Can interact with diuretics.
precautions.zh: 对豚草过敏者可能引起过敏反应。可能与利尿剂相互作用。

modern_research: Dandelion root shows hepatoprotective and diuretic properties in studies. (PubMed: 22012127, 24027893)

uses.en: Syrup, tea, capsules, or gummies. Cook berries before eating (raw berries are toxic).
uses.zh: 糖浆、茶、胶囊或软糖。食用前需煮熟（生浆果有毒）。

precautions.en: Raw berries, leaves, and bark are toxic. Only use commercially prepared products or cooked berries.
precautions.zh: 生浆果、叶和树皮有毒。只使用商业产品或煮熟的浆果。

modern_research: Elderberry extract shows significant antiviral effects against influenza. (PubMed: 25363621, 27332171)

uses.en: Topical cream, oil infusion, tea, or wash. Apply directly to skin irritations.
uses.zh: 外用膏、油浸液、茶或清洗液。直接涂抹于皮肤刺激处。

precautions.en: May cause allergic reactions in people allergic to daisy family plants.
precautions.zh: 对雏菊科植物过敏者可能引起过敏反应。

modern_research: Calendula has demonstrated wound healing and anti-inflammatory properties. (PubMed: 23946311)

zh: 减轻压力和皮质醇水平

uses.en: Powder, capsules, or tea. Mix powder with warm milk or water.
uses.zh: 粉剂、胶囊或茶。将粉末与温牛奶或水混合。

precautions.en: May interact with thyroid, blood sugar, and blood pressure medications. Avoid during pregnancy.
precautions.zh: 可能与甲状腺、血糖和血压药物相互作用。孕期避免使用。

modern_research: Extensive research supports ashwagandha as an adaptogen for stress and anxiety. (PubMed: 23439798, 26471528)

names.ja: セントジョーンズワート
names.ja_reading: セントジョーンズワート

uses.en: Tea, tincture, capsules, or oil. Steep flowers in hot water for 10 minutes.
uses.zh: 茶、酊剂、胶囊或油。将花朵浸泡在热水中10分钟。

precautions.en: Interacts with MANY medications including birth control, antidepressants, and blood thinners. Consult doctor before use.
precautions.zh: 与许多药物相互作用，包括避孕药、抗抑郁药和抗凝血药。使用前请咨询医生。

modern_research: Well-studied for mild to moderate depression, comparable to SSRIs. (PubMed: 18456679, 12893527)

uses.en: Standardized extract (EGb 761), tea, or capsules.
uses.zh: 标准化提取物（EGb 761）、茶或胶囊。

precautions.en: May interact with blood thinners. Seeds are toxic in large quantities.
precautions.zh: 可能与抗凝血药相互作用。大量食用种子有毒。

modern_research: Extensive research on cognitive effects, with mixed but promising results. (PubMed: 19169936, 10767708)

uses.en: Capsules, tincture, or tea. Standardized extract is most common.
uses.zh: 胶囊、酊剂或茶。标准化提取物最常用。

precautions.en: May interact with hormone medications and blood thinners.
precautions.zh: 可能与激素药物和抗凝血药相互作用。

modern_research: Some evidence for benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) symptoms. (PubMed: 22336127, 21486426)

uses.en: Fresh leaves, tea, or capsules. Chew 2-3 fresh leaves daily for migraine prevention.
uses.zh: 新鲜叶子、茶或胶囊。每天嚼2-3片新鲜叶子预防偏头痛。

precautions.en: May interact with blood thinners. Can cause mouth sores if chewed fresh.
precautions.zh: 可能与抗凝血药相互作用。嚼新鲜叶子可能导致口腔溃疡。

modern_research: Parthenolide (active compound) shows promise for migraine prevention. (PubMed: 22590912)

uses.en: Tea, essential oil, or capsules. Steep fresh or dried leaves in hot water.
uses.zh: 茶、精油或胶囊。将新鲜或干燥叶子浸泡在热水中。

precautions.en: May interact with thyroid medications and sedatives.
precautions.zh: 可能与甲状腺药物和镇静剂相互作用。

modern_research: Lemon balm shown to reduce anxiety and improve cognitive function. (PubMed: 24106684, 23403338)

uses.en: Decoction, capsules, or added to soups. Common in women's health formulas.
uses.zh: 煎剂、胶囊或加入汤中。常用于妇科方剂。

precautions.en: Avoid during pregnancy and heavy menstruation. May interact with blood thinners.
precautions.zh: 孕期和月经量多者不宜使用。可能与抗凝血药相互作用。

modern_research: Studies show dong quai may help with menstrual disorders and menopausal symptoms. (PubMed: 17061733)

uses.en: Tea, decoction, or added to herbal formulas as a harmonizer.
uses.zh: 茶、煎剂或作为调和药加入方剂中。

precautions.en: Can raise blood pressure with prolonged use. Avoid with hypertension.
precautions.zh: 长期使用可能升高血压。高血压患者避免使用。

modern_research: Glycyrrhizin has antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties. (PubMed: 24296192, 23550344)

uses.en: Tea, decoction, or external wash. Steep flowers in hot water for 10 minutes.
uses.zh: 茶、煎剂或外洗液。将花朵浸泡在热水中10分钟。

precautions.en: Not suitable for cold-type conditions. Use with caution during pregnancy.
precautions.zh: 不适用于寒证。孕期慎用。

modern_research: Honeysuckle extracts show antiviral and anti-inflammatory activity. (PubMed: 23710165)

uses.en: Tea, eye wash (cooled), or cooking. Steep flowers in hot water for 5-10 minutes.
uses.zh: 茶、洗眼液（冷却后）或烹饪。将花朵浸泡在热水中5-10分钟。

precautions.en: Not suitable for cold-type conditions with chills.
precautions.zh: 不适用于寒证怕冷者。

modern_research: Chrysanthemum contains luteolin and other flavonoids beneficial for eye health. (PubMed: 24769116)

uses.en: Granules dissolved in hot water, capsules, or decoction.
uses.zh: 冲剂、胶囊或煎剂。

precautions.en: Not for long-term use. Avoid in cold-type conditions.
precautions.zh: 不宜长期使用。寒证不宜使用。

modern_research: Widely used in China for respiratory infections; some evidence for antiviral activity. (PubMed: 28902378)

uses.en: Decoction or capsules. Key ingredient in Xiao Chai Hu Tang formula.
uses.zh: 煎剂或胶囊。小柴胡汤的关键成分。

precautions.en: May cause dizziness in high doses. Avoid with autoimmune conditions.
precautions.zh: 大剂量可能导致头晕。自身免疫性疾病患者避免使用。

modern_research: Saikosaponins (active compounds) show anti-inflammatory and liver-protective effects. (PubMed: 16901203)

uses.en: Decoction, powder, or added to soups. Often used in classical formulas.
uses.zh: 煎剂、粉末或加入汤中。常用于经典方剂。

precautions.en: Generally safe. Use with caution in cases of severe yin deficiency.
precautions.zh: 一般安全。阴虚严重者慎用。

modern_research: Poria cocos polysaccharides show immunomodulatory effects. (PubMed: 28704924)

uses.en: Decoction or powder. Commonly paired with Poria in formulas.
uses.zh: 煎剂或粉末。常与茯苓配伍使用。

precautions.en: Not suitable for yin deficiency with heat signs.
precautions.zh: 阴虚内热者不宜使用。

modern_research: Atractylodes has gastroprotective and anti-inflammatory properties. (PubMed: 25724506)

uses.en: Decoction, tincture, or topical oil. Used in blood-moving formulas.
uses.zh: 煎剂、酊剂或外用油。用于活血方剂。

precautions.en: Avoid during pregnancy. May increase bleeding risk.
precautions.zh: 孕期禁用。可能增加出血风险。

modern_research: Hydroxysafflor yellow A shows neuroprotective and cardioprotective effects. (PubMed: 25158952)

uses.en: Powder, capsules, or decoction. Taken internally or applied topically for wounds.
uses.zh: 粉末、胶囊或煎剂。内服或外用于伤口。

precautions.en: Avoid during pregnancy. May interact with blood thinners.
precautions.zh: 孕期禁用。可能与抗凝血药相互作用。

modern_research: Notoginsenosides have hemostatic and cardioprotective properties. (PubMed: 25139562)

uses.en: Decoction, tea, or capsules. Often simmered for 30+ minutes.
uses.zh: 煎剂、茶或胶囊。通常需煎煮30分钟以上。

precautions.en: Not suitable for conditions with cold and dampness.
precautions.zh: 寒湿证不宜使用。

modern_research: Dendrobium polysaccharides show immunomodulatory and antioxidant effects. (PubMed: 27022980)

uses.en: Decoction, powder, or capsules. Often paired with Gastrodia-Uncaria formula.
uses.zh: 煎剂、粉末或胶囊。常与钩藤配伍使用。

precautions.en: Generally safe. Use with caution in blood deficiency.
precautions.zh: 一般安全。血虚者慎用。

modern_research: Gastrodin (active compound) has neuroprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. (PubMed: 25710988)
ben_cao_ref: 本草纲目·草部·赤箭/天麻

uses.en: Decoction, capsules, or tea. Simmer bark for 20-30 minutes.
uses.zh: 煎剂、胶囊或茶。树皮需煎煮20-30分钟。

precautions.en: Generally safe. May interact with blood pressure medications.
precautions.zh: 一般安全。可能与降压药相互作用。

modern_research: Eucommia bark extract shows antihypertensive and bone-strengthening effects. (PubMed: 22963622)

uses.en: Decoction (processed form only). Must be processed before use - raw form is toxic.
uses.zh: 煎剂（仅用炮制品）。必须炮制后使用——生品有毒。

precautions.en: RAW FORM IS TOXIC. Always use processed (Fa Ban Xia). Avoid during pregnancy.
precautions.zh: 生品有毒！必须使用法半夏或姜半夏。孕期禁用。

modern_research: Processed pinellia has antiemetic and expectorant effects. (PubMed: 25162586)

uses.en: Tea, decoction, or added to cooking. Aged peel is more valued.
uses.zh: 茶、煎剂或加入烹饪中。陈年陈皮价值更高。

precautions.en: Not suitable for dry cough due to yin deficiency.
precautions.zh: 阴虚燥咳不宜使用。

modern_research: Citrus peel flavonoids have anti-inflammatory and digestive benefits. (PubMed: 27837509)
